name: project-legibility
description: Codex skills for repository work that continues across tasks.

interface.shortDescription: Keep repository work resumable and changes verifiable.
interface.longDescription: Resume project context, check source decisions, structure code changes, and keep repository guidance current.
defaultPrompt: Read this repository's latest project notes and continue the implementation.
Compare this port with its source repository and list where it diverges.
Verify this change and leave a note so work can resume in the next task.
